title: cerastium velutinum var. velutinum
intro: Cerastium velutinum var. velutinum, also known as Downy Chickweed, is a perennial plant species belonging to the carnation family (Caryophyllaceae). Traditionally, it has been used in herbal medicine due to its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties, which contribute to its medicinal value. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, including soothing skin irritations, reducing fever, and alleviating respiratory issues such as coughs and colds. Cerastium velutinum var. velutinum can be prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or salve, allowing for various applications in traditional medicine.
